characters.description: Earth's Forerunner and the leader of the effort to move Galen's population to safety. He directs the portal operation, shields its mages from a bombing attempt, and works with his trusted Eidolon, Urg, to protect the evacuation.
characters.name: Silas Renner

characters.description: A Humans-Only Alliance member who joins a suicidal rush against the Galen evacuation's portal mages while carrying an unstable mana bomb. His confused condition suggests that the attack may involve manipulation beyond his own choices.
characters.name: Simon Benson

characters.description: Silas Renner's trusted Eidolon, protector, and companion from earlier adventures.
characters.name: Urg

characters.description: Silas Renner's off-world mentor and a Rayden ally known from earlier books. He provides counsel, training, and practical support as Silas faces threats that reach far beyond Earth.
characters.name: Samvek

characters.description: The Lepun leader and an established ally of Silas Renner. She is committed to protecting her people and works with Silas's wider coalition as Earth struggles through induction.
characters.name: Vex

characters.description: A trusted ally in Silas Renner's circle who specializes in evolution and biological change.
characters.name: Asta

characters.description: A Turga agent and Silas Renner's partner. She can reshape her appearance through reality manipulation, making her the natural choice to investigate the Humans-Only Alliance from within.
characters.name: Selena

characters.description: A temporal fighter and House Kalestian ally who helps contain an unstable bomb by slowing time around it. She also supports Selena's investigation of the Humans-Only Alliance.
characters.name: Lana

characters.description: Samvek's bonded dragon and a member of the allied group.
characters.name: Azuria

characters.description: Silas Renner's evacuation coordinator. She manages the portal operation's logistics, support teams, and shifting bottlenecks while millions of people from Galen wait for passage to Earth.
characters.name: Simone

characters.description: A returning Galenian ally who helps organize the evacuation at Anwich. She works with local leaders and Silas Renner's other companions to keep the enormous refugee movement functioning.
characters.name: Dory

characters.description: A Galenian ally assisting the mass evacuation at Anwich. Alongside Dory and Nevin, he helps Silas Renner's team manage the people and resources gathered around the portal.
characters.name: Crag

characters.description: A Galenian ally supporting the Anwich evacuation. He works with Dory, Crag, and the local administration as Silas Renner tries to increase the flow of refugees through the portal.
characters.name: Nevin

characters.description: An Earth Forerunner working to stabilize Africa and build a refuge there. Her settlement takes in Galenian arrivals even while its defenders contend with the dangers created by Earth's rising mana.
characters.name: Ada

characters.description: An unexplained figure connected to the warning about Galen. Silas Renner associates him with forces that show no detectable mana or ordinary system presence, leaving his nature and purpose uncertain.
characters.name: Jay

characters.description: A priest whom Silas Renner regards as a possible adviser on spatial travel and unfamiliar energy systems. His knowledge may help distinguish the forces threatening Galen from ordinary system magic.
characters.name: Baran

characters.description: Silas Renner's blood brother and a powerful cultivator ally. Silas seeks his help as the Forlorn threat becomes clearer and the Galen evacuation requires stronger defenders.
characters.name: Ryan

characters.description: A dragon leader who controls the dragon soul vault. His authority over that resource makes him an important figure as Silas Renner's allies assess the role dragons may play in Earth's future.
characters.name: Nico

characters.description: An ascendant ally whose power is suppressed to protect Earth. She agrees to help Ryan stabilize the Galen evacuation portal.
characters.name: Cami

characters.description: Silas Renner's sister and the rider of a red dragon. She joins his expedition to contain the evolving lunar dungeon, bringing her own combat abilities to a party facing legendary dangers.
characters.name: Cece Renner

characters.description: Silas Renner's sworn brother and the rider of a green dragon. He joins the lunar expedition as part of the team assigned to keep a dangerous evolving dungeon away from Earth.
characters.name: Jiang

characters.description: An anti-refugee broadcaster aligned with the Humans-Only Alliance. She uses her program to oppose Silas Renner and the Galenian resettlement effort while apparently benefiting from unidentified outside support.
characters.name: Annie Dungeon

characters.description: Hell's ruler and a prospective patron for Silas Renner. He claims to have delayed further interference from Hell and offers Silas access to a separate class system for a limited time.
characters.name: Asmodeus

characters.description: A radically changed figure seen only in one possible future. In that uncertain vision, she protects an older Silas Renner, but the path leading to her transformation is not yet known.
characters.name: Lily Aspen

characters.description: A five-headed dragon who appears in a possible future beside Nico during the struggle against the Abhorrent. The vision presents her as a major power, but does not establish whether that future will occur.
characters.name: Tiamat

characters.description: A higher power believed to have sent Nico into the deep void to engage with the fringe event. The Heavens expect the Voice and other higher powers to address the Abhorrent.
characters.name: The Voice

characters.description: The founder of House Kalestian and the sponsor behind Silas Renner's adoption into its inner family. His house accepts Silas while allowing the future House Renner to remain distinct.
characters.name: Abel Kalestian

characters.description: An epic-tier envoy from a branch of House Kalestian. Appointed as Silas Renner's monitor and instructor, he arrives to explain the privileges and duties attached to inner-family status.
characters.name: Darius Vala

characters.description: A trusted military commander among the rabbit-people who is under consideration for the limited expedition to Hell.
characters.name: The rabbit-man commander

characters.description: Selena's uncle and the head of Turga. He requires Selena and Silas Renner to come to Turga and formally arrange their marriage.
characters.name: The Turga patriarch

characters.description: A goddess who removes Abel Kalestian and confronts Silas Renner after Tiamat's death. Her arrival interrupts the aftermath of Galen's defense and leaves Silas without Abel's protection.
characters.name: The unnamed goddess
